llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: GB/G Head of Finance Services
jobs.company: BASF Global Business Services Private Limited
jobs.description: Head of Finance India will lead all finance activities for the Service Delivery Unit (SDU) in India, ensuring strong financial control, insightful business partnering, and effective delivery of finance services that support the SDU’s growth and operational excellence. This role combines strategic leadership, operational finance management, process optimization, and people leadership to enable data-driven decisions and alignment with global finance standards. Key Responsibilities Financial leadership strategy Develop and execute the SDU’s strategy in alignment with global objectives. Serve as the primary finance business partner to the global Finance GBS community, translating financial implications of strategic and operational decisions. Responsible for budgeting, forecasting, long-range planning, and scenario analysis; drive financial discipline and performance. Operational finance process delivery Manage end-to-end finance processes delivered by the SDU (e.g., accounts payable/receivable, closing cycles, management accounting), ensuring efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and high service levels. Identify and implement process improvements, automation, and standardization Manage capa

jobs.description: O bjecti v es of t h e P osi t ion In charge of controlling tasks of EC Automotive Coatings in India, i.e. planning and performance management, product costing in production site, business analysis, governance and compliance As trusted business partner to local business and site management team to provide reliable data for management decision making Participate in business steering projects/initiatives within the business unit and structurally evaluate financial scenarios/ models M ain T as k s Planning and performance management Accountable for operational planning and forecasting processes, including OEM Coatings and Refinish Coatings. Coordinate and support local and site management for target setting. Closely align and liaise with GBU/RBU controlling during this process. Consulted on cost center structure, implementation of activity-based cost charging. Business analysis Responsible for local reporting landscape, closely liaise with GBU/RBU. Responsible for business and site production performance analysis/ steering, provide gap analysis and recommendation for management decision. jobs.title: Business Controller - Performance Materials, India
jobs.description: About The Role Lead PM Controlling team in India by steering, providing guidance and inspiring the team to be valued business partners for stakeholders in India. Be responsible for overall controlling, reporting, business analysis activities and ensuring compliance in India. Represent PM interest in discussion with other functions and units in the countries Be responsible for overall PM site controlling and reporting activities in Thane, Dahej and Panoli. Ensuring site operates with clear visibility of its cost structures and strategies. Drive digitalization initiatives to promote AI usage within Controlling and reduce manual task to increase efficiency of the team How You Will Do It Planning Performance Management Ensure timely submission of monthly analysis and business commentary to A-PMA Controlling share point (e.g. CM1 margin and Fixed Cost comment, manufacturing cost analysis and commentary, capital expenditure report, raw material cost development report). Conduct business analysis; provide self-explanatory comments in business reports, clearly explaining the reasons for deviations. Ensure accurate data in the systems (esp. jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Reporting & MIS
jobs.description: About The Role Ensure that statutory reporting is completed in compliance manner and on timely basis. Ensure that group reporting is completed in compliant manner and on timely basis. Ensure completion of limited review and audits with quality and controls on a timely basis. Perform basic analysis on the financial statement How Will You Do It Finalize the results statutory audit of BIL on quarterly basis and on yearly basis (including liaison with Deloitte) Prepare for Board meeting, ACM, AGM, Analyst Meet Handle Risk management (Analysis and meeting presentation) Ensure adequacy, efficiency and effectiveness of Internal Controls over Financial Reporting (with Hub) Support Group Reporting and audit Provide support in terms of Non trade portal Prepare Financial statement review Complete Financial reporting compliance cycle for local controls Prepare the Corporate Governance folder on quarterly basis for BIL Board reporting Handle financial reporting for BASF group companies including GL Monitoring, Audit ( including liaison with Deloitte) , MIS and Group Reporting support to HUB What We Look For Edu c a t i o n: Chartered Accountant W o r k in g Experience: 10 years+ (experience wit
